title: Destructure %Post{author: %User{name: name}} in function head
prompt: Write `MyApp.Display.author_name/1` that takes a `%Post{author: %User{name: name}}` struct and returns the name. Destructure both levels in the function head — do not access `post.author` or `author.name` inside the body. Add a second clause matching `%Post{author: nil}` that returns `"Anonymous"`. Output a complete `defmodule MyApp.Display do ... end` (with `alias MyApp.{Post, User}`).
tier_rationale: Nested struct destructuring is textbook; two-clause function.
